fields.description: Customer SIP of Rs 5000 failed. Bank returned rejection.

analysis.description: Customer SIP of Rs 5000 failed. Bank returned rejection.

comments.body: Investigated transaction TXN20240601000001. Event log showed bank rejection code 51 (Insufficient Funds). Customer account balance was below SIP amount. Executed payment retry after customer confirmed funds added. Retry successful.
comments.author: support-agent@fundsindia.com
